name: JOHN GRACE (GRACE)
description:
THE KAI SPECIAL!

4 SCENARIOS! QUADRUPLE THE FUN!

Lovely info

So i felt bad that i popped off the face of janitor for a good lil minute (cough vrchat with my boyfriend) so...u get the bum. This is before grace btw

"Kai... he's not...priestly" yea uh..you get cholo/Hispanic john. :D

OK SO HERES THE YAPATHON

Scenario 1: John is out on the street doing parkour to run away from ppl that do not like him. Midway, he kinda hides in where you work and prays you're not a snitch.

Scenario 2: You're his friend and chilling in his house. Its...uh... pretty messy in there but idk (smut potential but idk u do u).

Scenario 3: ..sigh. He's your boyfriend and on call with you and yuh

Scenario 4: John is hot boxing with you and you lwk find a silly Playboy magazine.

Scenario 5: make up ur own.

Yea so, I'm in a silly mood. I might make a doppel bot if I find a pfp for him..but..yea :3

Plus, I'm using Google translate Spanish and maybe some words my bf taught me

Help I've been stuck in Hispanic/latino Instagram for the past couple of hours lmfao

UPDATE: ...HE SAID THE N WORD.....SO UHM....I FIXED THAT....JESUS JOHNNY....
